name: Realty Income Corporation 6.000% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Realty Income Corporation is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that focuses on acquiring and managing commercial properties leased to retail tenants under long-term net lease agreements. The O^ ticker represents a series of cumulative redeemable preferred stock issued by the company. Realty Income is headquartered in San Diego, California.
